summary: Backend-only testing of seller scenario completed. All 13 tests passed - covering seller registration, admin approval workflow, store settings with mandatory location validation, and payment accounts CRUD.

minor.issue: Backend accepts store settings without location (latitude/longitude) - validation is done on frontend only
minor.note: This is by design - frontend enforces mandatory location via JavaScript validation before API call

critical_code_review_comments: Location validation is frontend-enforced (StoreSettingsTab.js line 76-79) - backend accepts without location
Seller registration correctly sets is_approved=False for new sellers
Admin approval endpoint works correctly via /api/admin/sellers/{id}/approve
JWT token-based authentication working properly for all protected endpoints

test_seller_created.note: New seller created each test run with random phone

seed_data_creation: TEST_بائع اختباري جديد seller created and approved during test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seller scenario (Part 1 of 3) complete. All seller registration, admin approval, and store settings APIs working correctly. Location validation is enforced on frontend via JavaScript, not backend API.

seller_registration.notes: New seller with user_type='seller' gets is_approved=False by default

pending_sellers_list.notes: Returns list of sellers with pending documents (empty if no documents submitted)

seller_login_after_approval.notes: Seller can login and is_approved=True confirmed

store_settings_get.notes: Returns store_name, store_description, store_address, store_city, store_phone

store_settings_update_without_location.notes: Backend accepts without location - frontend enforces mandatory location

store_settings_update_with_location.notes: Full update with latitude/longitude works correctly

store_settings_persistence.notes: Data correctly persisted and retrieved after update

payment_accounts_crud.notes: Full CRUD operations working for shamcash account type

duplicate_phone_registration.notes: Returns 400 for duplicate phone - correctly rejected
